unlockedEvidence: exact version marker plus canonical shader name
canonical 9.3/Toon path plus exact version marker
lockedEvidence: Hidden/Locked shader name plus exact source marker
required property signature plus optimizer marker
matchingPolicy.unknownVersionBehavior: reject Poiyomi conversion and warn with POI0001

diagnostics.meaning: Poiyomi shader family recognized but source version is unknown.
Locked/generated shader matched only by property signature; original GUID or marker was unavailable.
Runtime-visible source property has no parity classification.
Pinned source identity or generated catalog hash does not match.
Source feature is preserved but inactive because an engine integration is unavailable.
Source property is recognized but its runtime conversion is not implemented.
Source property could not be parsed or preserved.
Source render state has no exact XRENGINE representation.
Source animation binding could not be mapped deterministically.
Native equivalent differs intentionally from Unity, VRChat, or ThryEditor behavior.
